description: Economic-safety tools for trading agents: executable quote + rug/honeypot pretrade check via x402.
name: com.getplexa/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Funded wallet private key — pays Plexa per call (x402 USDC) and signs locally. Plexa never receives it. Use a dedicated low-balance wallet.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_WALLET_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Plexa public API base URL (default https://api.getplexa.com).
environmentVariables.name: PLEXA_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Chain the wallet is funded on / quotes default to: base | polygon | arbitrum (default base).
environmentVariables.name: CHAIN
